notes: Get Started: what Clay is, one-paragraph Lexicon explanation, installation (NPM/Yarn/CDN), quick start, composition philosophy, and positioning guidance (when to use Clay vs Liferay's site-building stack). Positioning wording pending product-messaging alignment.

Foundations Color: full merged palette reference. Lexicon provides the palette, variations, and usage roles; clayui.com/docs/css/color provides the SCSS variable names and utility classes. Hex values are plain inline code; the viewer renders swatch chips next to them.
Foundations Typography, rewritten under the Clay umbrella from the Lexicon typography foundation.
Foundations Grid, rewritten under the Clay umbrella from the Lexicon grid foundation. Images copied from Lexicon grid folder.

Merged Lexicon alert design spec (types, attributes, variations: feedback, toast, embedded, stripe, inline) with clayui.com implementation (displayType, variant, ToastContainer, Footer). API generated from @clayui/alert.
Merged Lexicon badge design spec (numeric usage rules, do/don't spacing) with clayui.com implementation (displayType, symbol, translucent, dark). API generated from @clayui/badge.

Merged Lexicon button design spec (types, states, sizes, dos and don'ts, variations) with clayui.com implementation (display types, groups, icon buttons). Action-buttons subpage folded into the Variants and anatomy section. API generated from @clayui/button for Button, Button.Group, and ClayButtonWithIcon.

Merged Lexicon card design spec (anatomy, variations: image, user, file, folder, navigation) with clayui.com implementation (low-level composition and high-level ClayCardWith* components). API generated from @clayui/card.

Merged Lexicon dropdown design spec (types, action ordering, sizing) with clayui.com implementation (low-level composition, high-level ClayDropDownWithItems and ClayDropDownWithDrilldown, search filtering). API generated from @clayui/drop-down for DropDown and DropDown.Item.

Merged Lexicon modal design spec (anatomy, sizes, status types, footer compositions, do/don't) with clayui.com implementation (useModal observer pattern, Modal.Header/Body/Footer, status). API generated from @clayui/modal.

Merged Lexicon table design spec (anatomy, row states, header sorting, do/don't) with clayui.com implementation (Table/Head/Body/Row/Cell, static vs dynamic content, sorting, nested rows). Table ships in @clayui/core. API generated from @clayui/core.

Merged Lexicon tooltip design spec (purpose, positions, length limit, disabled-element handling) with clayui.com implementation (direct Tooltip and ClayTooltipProvider with title attributes). API generated from @clayui/tooltip.
CSS framework overview condensed from clayui.com/docs/css: Atlas and base themes, install/CDN, and the utility taxonomy (flex, spacing, text, display, borders, and more).
Common Actions pattern from Lexicon Patterns: the standard action set and how actions are grouped, ordered, and surfaced.
Merged Lexicon labels spec (simple/outline/bold status, removable, link, sizes, dos and donts) with clayui.com implementation (displayType, withClose). API from @clayui/label.
Merged Lexicon link spec (inline, single, title, external) with clayui.com implementation (displayType, ClayLinkContext). API from @clayui/link.
Merged Lexicon stickers spec (shapes, sizes 24-48, colors, position) with clayui.com implementation (displayType, size, Sticker.Image). API from @clayui/sticker.
Merged Lexicon tabs spec (classic vs modern, selection rules, More overflow) with clayui.com implementation (controlled Tabs, Item, Content, TabPane). API from @clayui/tabs.
Merged Lexicon progress bar spec (loading/warning/finished, not for user steps) with clayui.com implementation (value, warn). API from @clayui/progress-bar.
Merged Lexicon loading indicator spec (sizes, positive/negative, not inside buttons) with clayui.com implementation (shape circle/squares, size, displayType). API from @clayui/loading-indicator.
Merged Lexicon empty state spec (three scenarios, anatomy, message writing rules, secondary composition) with clayui.com implementation (imgSrc, reduced motion). API from @clayui/empty-state.

Popover split out of the Lexicon popovers-tooltips page (rich contextual help, help icon pairing, 280 char rule) merged with clayui.com implementation (alignPosition, header, trigger). API from @clayui/popover.
Merged Lexicon breadcrumb spec (collapse into dropdown, dos and donts) with clayui.com implementation (items, ellipsisBuffer). API from @clayui/breadcrumb.
Merged Lexicon navbar spec (default/inverted, overflow collapse) with clayui.com implementation (NavigationBar + Item, triggerLabel). API from @clayui/navigation-bar.
Merged Lexicon vertical navigation spec (left of forms, states, mobile collapse) with the @clayui/core VerticalNav implementation (items render prop, expanded keys). API from @clayui/core.

Merged Lexicon pagination + pagination bar spec (arrows, numbers, ellipsis, page size selector) with clayui.com implementation (ClayPaginationWithBasicItems, ClayPaginationBarWithBasicItems). Pager (draft in Lexicon) folded in as a variant note. API from @clayui/pagination and @clayui/pagination-bar.

Forms overview: structure, one/two column layout, spacing rules, sections, help mechanisms, validation placement. Condenses the Lexicon forms index plus hierarchy/rules/validation subpages. Overview page linking to each control; no API block by design (not a single component).

Merged Lexicon input spec (states, sizes, validation, text area growth, help mechanisms) with clayui.com implementation (ClayInput, Form.Group feedback). Input group and localized input folded in as variants. API from @clayui/form.
Merged Lexicon checkbox/radio/toggle spec (states, groups, dos and donts) with clayui.com implementation (ClayCheckbox, ClayRadioGroup, ClayToggle). API from @clayui/form.
Merged Lexicon selector spec (native control, input states, select vs dropdown distinction) with clayui.com implementation (ClaySelectWithOption, ClaySelect, SelectBox). API from @clayui/form.
Merged Lexicon multi select spec (tags as labels, autocomplete, paste to tags, allowlist) with clayui.com implementation (items/sourceItems, onItemsChange). API from @clayui/multi-select.
Merged Lexicon dual listbox spec (parts, transfer button states, ordering rules) with clayui.com implementation (ClayDualListBox). API from @clayui/form.

Merged the date half of the Lexicon date and time pickers spec (calendar anatomy, day states, extension points, native on mobile) with clayui.com implementation (controlled value, years range, time variant). API from @clayui/date-picker.
Merged the time half of the Lexicon date and time pickers spec (segmented editing, native on mobile) with clayui.com implementation (values object, use12Hours). API from @clayui/time-picker.

Merged Lexicon color picker spec (field anatomy, predefined and custom panels, restricted/unrestricted/simple variants) with clayui.com implementation (colors, onValueChange, native). API from @clayui/color-picker.
Merged Lexicon multi step form spec (2-7 steps, overflow dropdown, states, mobile condensation) with clayui.com implementation (ClayMultiStepNavWithBasicItems). API from @clayui/multi-step-nav.

Merged Lexicon tree view spec (box/node anatomy, node roles, tri-state selection, hover actions, focus rules) with the @clayui/core TreeView implementation (items, nestedKey, render props). API from @clayui/core.
Merged Lexicon toolbar spec (field/content blocks, layouts, spacing metrics) with clayui.com implementation (Toolbar.Nav/Item/Section). Upper toolbar covered via its story. API from @clayui/toolbar.
Management toolbar split out of the Lexicon toolbars page (dataset search/filter/selection, active state, results bar) merged with clayui.com implementation. API from @clayui/management-toolbar.
Merged Lexicon sidebar spec (product menu and info panel, push vs overlay breakpoints) with the @clayui/core SidePanel implementation. API from @clayui/core.
Merged Lexicon vertical bar spec (tab items, dividers, panel, stack areas, push/pull and hover modes, keyboard rules) with the @clayui/core VerticalBar implementation. API from @clayui/core.
Merged Lexicon list spec (row states, interactions, content format and alignment, sections, responsive rules) with clayui.com implementation (ClayList parts). API from @clayui/list.
Merged Lexicon slider spec (progress/thumb/track, states, steps, tooltip, keyboard map) with clayui.com implementation (controlled value, min/max/step). API from @clayui/slider.
Merged Lexicon icons spec (icons need labels, container sizing, single library rule, language flags rationale) with clayui.com implementation (spritemap symbols, Provider). API from @clayui/icon.
Clay-only component (no standalone Lexicon spec; behavior referenced from the Multi Select spec). Implementation and API from @clayui/autocomplete; flagged with a REVIEW comment for the design team.
Clay-only component page; collapsible-section design rules borrowed from the Lexicon forms guidance and flagged with a REVIEW comment. API from @clayui/panel.
Merged Lexicon timelines spec (variants by alignment, even/odd, mobile rule) with the Clay CSS markup pattern (no React component). No Storybook story exists; recorded in STORYBOOK-GAPS.md.
Foundations Animations: the three default empty state animations, usage rule (support a message), and theming guidance.
Foundations Layout: the four standard layouts (cards, form box, full box, sidebar and box) condensed from the Lexicon layout index and its four subpages.

Charts design overview (color-last rule, shared interactions, collection list). Per-chart-type Lexicon subpages not migrated in this pass; REVIEW comment asks the Clay team about the recommended charting implementation.
Merged Lexicon keys spec (monospaced style, unicode symbols) with the Clay CSS c-kbd implementation. CSS only; no story (recorded in STORYBOOK-GAPS.md).
Lexicon section spec (simple and collapsible, collapse level rules, sizes) pointing at the Panel sheet implementation in Clay.
Lexicon confirmation message spec (risk action and unintended consequence cases, when not to use, writing rules) implemented by composing status modals.
Lexicon dataset display pattern (management toolbar + views + pagination, view choice guidance) linking the composing component pages.
Writing rules for recurring content situations: actions, links, lists, messaging, descriptions, instructions, titles, and validations (confirmations, acknowledgments, errors, forms).
Drag and drop pattern: six events, pointer and handler rules, drag feedback (single, representation, multiple), drag source, valid target states, and drop animations.
Ellipsis pattern: horizontal vs vertical consistency rule, and the overflow, truncation, additional action, and activity use cases.
Clay-only (Beta, @clayui/core): select-like control with a styled options panel. Lexicon selector rules apply; REVIEW note on status.
Clay-only: searchable spritemap icon chooser. API from @clayui/core.
Clay-only: locale selector with flags and translation status. API from @clayui/core.
Merged Lexicon localizable input spec with clayui.com implementation (translations map, selected locale). Also summarized as a variant on the Input page. API from @clayui/localized-input.
Clay-only: dims the page except a highlighted area for onboarding tours. API from @clayui/core.
Clay-only utility: keeps keyboard focus inside a container for custom overlays. API from @clayui/core.
Clay-only utility: drag and keyboard resizing for panels; integrated by VerticalBar resize. API from @clayui/core.
Clay-only: typography heading component implementing the foundation levels. API from @clayui/core.
Clay-only: typography text component (sizes, weights, semantic colors) plus TextHighlight. API from @clayui/core.
Clay-only building block for navigation lists (pills, underline, stacked); specialized navs cover the Lexicon specs. API from @clayui/core.
React implementation of the grid/layout foundations: Container, Row, Col, Sheet. API from @clayui/layout.
Application Provider (spritemap, theme, reduced motion). The clayui.com reduced-motion page is folded in. API from @clayui/core (clay-provider source).
Clay-only utility: remote data fetching with caching and polling (useResource). API from @clayui/data-provider.
CSS markup pattern (DXP main navigation; satellite in Lexicon, included because Clay documents it). No React component, no story (in STORYBOOK-GAPS.md).
CSS markup pattern for collapsing vertical navigations on small screens; rendered by the VerticalNav React component. No story (in STORYBOOK-GAPS.md).
CSS utility classes for image proportions, rendered in React by Card.AspectRatio. No story (in STORYBOOK-GAPS.md).

Condensed Writing guide: the five principles, the framework (clarity, active voice, reading level, scannability, positive form, persons, tenses, localization), and the style essentials (capitalization, punctuation, numbers, dates ISO-8601, time). Links to Common Actions and Common Content Patterns per the original guide structure.
Curated merge of ten clayui.com CSS utility pages into one layout reference (autofit, display, flex, float, position, overflow, vertical align, visibility, sizing, inline items).
The c-spacing class anatomy (prefix, type, direction, breakpoint, value), the full scale, negative margins, and gap classes, renamed from C Spacing to a human name.
Text utility classes (sizes text-1..11, weights, styles, alignment, wrap/truncate, transforms), linked to the typography foundation and writing rules.
Curated merge of borders, rounded, shadows, palette color utilities, and the c-focus-inset and c-inner focus helpers.
sr-only and sr-only-focusable techniques plus the c-prefers-* user preference override classes.
Full theming guide: !default variables, Sass maps and null removal, variant mixins with the modifier-class rule, and helper functions.
